faults.description: issuanceDate set 1 day before parent node [7]
faults.expectedReaction: Technical: flag issuanceDate[8] < issuanceDate[7]; continue processing other nodes
Technical: flag issuanceDate in the future (2027); VC not yet valid

faults.description: RMAP listed on facilityRole=mine (RMAP is for refiners)
faults.expectedReaction: Certification: FAIL — RMAP cert category wrong for facilityRole=mine; IRMA absent
Compliance (CSDDD): FAIL on Art 5.1.a — due_diligence_policy_exists explicitly false (not UNCERTAIN)
Certification: FAIL/WARNING — SA8000 expected on social_risk_heavy node, not present
ESG: E1-001 WARNING — energySource=coal; contradiction with <30g CO2/kWh claim

faults.description: proof.verificationMethod replaced with ephRogue DID post-signing
faults.expectedReaction: Technical: FAIL — recovered signer=Eph7, verificationMethod claims ephRogue; DID mismatch + signer mismatch
Compliance: UNCERTAIN (CAHRA origin requires enhanced DD; not auto-fail if audit present). ESG: S3-001 high-risk flag for DRC
Compliance: FAIL on Art 6 (third_party_audit_exists=false, audit_independence=false). Cert: IRMA wrong for refiner

faults.description: claims:{} — no CSDDD or conflict_minerals evidence
faults.expectedReaction: Compliance: UNCERTAIN (not FAIL) — missing evidence is absence-of-data, not denial. claims:{} has no fields to evaluate

faults.description: quantity changed 1→999 after signing; JWS will fail
faults.expectedReaction: Technical: FAIL — signature_verified=false; quantity=999 in pinned doc ≠ quantity=1 in signed payload hash
ESG: G1-001 FAIL — latitude/longitude null; -0.5 governance penalty; S2-001 missing_location mode

faults.description: faulted_anchor_manifest.json has node-16 CID for node 17
faults.expectedReaction: Technical: FAIL — getVcHash() returns keccak256(cid_16) ≠ keccak256(cid_17); anchor mismatch on node 17

faults.description: VC signed by ephRogue wallet, not WalletDeployer
faults.expectedReaction: Technical: FAIL — recovered signer=ephRogue ≠ expected WalletDeployer from verificationMethod; rogue signer
